creator: raimeetravel
caption:
A Kyoto guide you probably haven’t seen before. Everyone talks about the same famous spots, but these places made me fall in love with the city even more! This was my third visit to Kyoto, and I still want to return again and again! 

@visit_kyoto #pr #kyoto #Ohara #Yamashina #kyototravel

transcription.text: people always give the same recommendations for kyoto so i'm going to show you three things you've definitely never seen recommended anywhere else. so if you want to avoid the crowds and have a very unique cultural experience off the tourist trail, this is what you're going to do. and of course i'm going to tell you how to do it too on a budget. these are three very special temples that i've never seen anyone mention before. this one is located a bit outside of the city center but it's in the gorgeous surrounding mountain area. this next one is so peaceful and you can have amazing matcha here. i swear this is probably the best matcha i've ever had. and finally, this one is known for its beautiful gardens and its ties to the legendary poet onono komachi. these are all a little off the tourist trail of kyoto but you can easily get to them. find this in any train station, purchase a bus ticket, and you'll be able to get to all of these places. save this for your trip and comment kyoto and i'll send you my full list of hidden gems around the city.
